Known as the "sandbar dweller" in the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] language, the '''bandara''' was a [[Beetle/Legends|beetle]]-like creature that inhabited the rivers of [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]. Drift-feeders, they gathered in huge swarms resting on sandbars while feeding on the detritus that floated by. Seeing a swarm of bandaras on the river was considered good luck by Devaronian river [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] because it warned them of shallow [[Water/Legends|waters]]. During the [[Reproduction/Legends|mating]] season, [[Gender/Legends|male]] bandaras coarsely sang to attract potential mates, a drone that was unbearable to female Devaronians. They tried to wipe out the [[Insect/Legends|insects]], but were unable to exterminate them completely. However, male Devaronians could tolerate the song of the bandaras. They were rumored to have hired mercenaries to help save the [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CG" />
